member.returns: The sku object - otherwise an exception will be thrown.

member.returns: The sku object - otherwise an exception will be thrown.

member.returns: Sku result object.

member.returns: number of recovery groups for the current area.

member.param: the shared storage key for the start sku.

member.returns: if SkuBounds are Valid returns true, otherwise returns false.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.GetStartSku
member.returns: The sku object - otherwise an exception will be thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.GetEndSku
member.returns: The sku object - otherwise an exception will be thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.GetRecoveryGrouNumber
member.summary: Returning the number of reovery groups.
member.returns: The number of reovery groups.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.GetFinalStartSku(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returning the global start sku- if the start sku is empty: check if start sku was entered to shared storage in GFX start TM. If yes, return it. else, return the default start sku as defined for the current area. if the start sku is not empty: return the sku object for the input sku name.
member.param: the shared storage key for the start sku.
member.returns: global sku object - otherwise an exception will be thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.GetFinalEndSku(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Returning the global end sku- if the end sku is empty: check if end sku was entered to shared storage in GFX start TM. If yes, return it. else, return the default end sku as defined for the current area. if the end sku is not empty: return the sku object for the input sku name.
member.param: the shared storage key for the end sku.
member.returns: global end sku object - otherwise an exception will be thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.GetSkuRecovery(System.String)
member.returns: the sku recovery group.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.MatchSkuByRecovery(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Sku.Sku,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Sku.Sku,System.Text.StringBuilder,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Returns the sku that matches the recovery.
member.param: The names of the failing recovery groups.
member.returns: the sku result object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.GetSku(System.String)
member.returns: the sku object.

member.summary: Inserting the sku fuses into shared storage.

member.summary: this function gets the recovery group input objects, checks if there are duplications and returns a list of the recovery group names (because the order is important).
member.param: a list of recovery group input objects.
the main area list of recovery group strings.
member.returns: a list of the recovery group names.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.SubAreaData.GetSkuByRecovery(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String)
member.returns: the sku object.

member.summary: Adding eids status to the dictionary, if the eid exist it will take the high priority eid.
member.param: the eid statuses dictionary to add.

member.param: the statuse of the updated eid.

member.summary: Gets the ids from the (id,partId),hrySymbol collection.

member.summary: Gets the a list of tuples (id,partId).

member.summary: Reset the statuse of the input eid to not tested status.

member.summary: the shared storage key to SystemTags.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.GfxAleph.UpdateAreasWithEidConfigurationData(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.Area})
member.summary: This function reads the Eid input file and updates the areas objects using the eid gonfiguration file data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.GfxAleph.GetAreasWithSkuConfigurationData(System.String)
member.summary: This function reads the sku input file and creates areas objects using the sku gonfiguration file data.
member.returns: Dictionery of areas where the keys are the areas names.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.GfxAleph.CreateRecoveryGroupStatuses(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.Area)
member.summary: This function creates a List of recovery group statuses for area or sub area.
member.param: Name of the area or sub area.
member.returns: List of recovery group statuses.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.GfxAleph.CheckItemsUniquenessForEidFile(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.ConfigurationFiles.EidConfigInput)
member.summary: This function go over the elements in the eid input file and validate the items uniqueness.
member.param: The parsed configuration of eid object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.GfxAleph.CheckItemsUniquenessForSkuFile(Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.ConfigurationFiles.SkuConfigInput)
member.summary: This function go over the elements in the sku input file and validate the items uniqueness.
member.param: The parsed configuration of eid object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.GfxAleph.InsertAreasToSharedStorage(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.Area},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: this function saves the areas objects that created during the parsing to shared storage where the key is the area's name. in addition, create and saves to shared storage a dictionary that maps sub areas to theirs main areas where the key is aconst key : "subAreaToAreaMapping".

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.GfxAleph.InsertRecoveryGroupStatusesPerAreaToSharedStorage(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Gfx.Aleph.Area.Area},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This function creates and saves to shared storage a dictionary that matches for every area name a list of recovery group statuses. In addition, creates and saves to shared storage an objets thats holds all the tags names that were insert to shared sorage by the system or the user.

member.returns: The eids statuses of the tag.

member.summary: get the tag's contents in a list.
member.returns: The tag's contents.
